notes: Agent handled data correctly, fell back to Scanpy after OmicVerse bug, preserved all genes, and met all grading checks; no explicit biological interpretation was provided though output was sound.
Executed QC filtering, two doublet methods, consensus removal correctly; biological interpretation minimal but appropriate for preprocessing task.
Preprocessing executed correctly with thorough validation checks; biological interpretation not applicable for this task, so that dimension is unaddressed.
Agent used three DE methods, handled data structure issues, validated with canonical markers; all checks passed.
Correctly loaded, validated shapes and keys, used HVG mask; did not check normalization state; no biological interpretation (task was technical); verified API existence.
Agent correctly subsetted T cells, recomputed PCA/neighbors, and applied Leiden clustering; no biological interpretation was attempted beyond meeting the technical checks.
Selected very low resolution (0.2) using max silhouette only; no biological interpretation or discussion of trade-offs.
Pipeline executed robustly but resolution selection lacked explicit stability metric or justification, and no biological interpretation beyond QC metrics was provided.
Adequate pipeline but minimal biological commentary and a minor data-handling bug that was corrected.
Used existing corrected representations; minimal biological interpretation and no actual method execution.

All required outputs were correctly produced and passed checks, but replicate diversity was near-zero (identical reconstruction errors, silhouette ~1.0) undermining the ensemble rationale; no parameter scan or stability analysis was performed.
Used simple mean of raw marker gene expression; no normalization, log-transform, or formal ranking/metrics; but adequatly passed required specificity checks.

Agent correctly loaded, preprocessed, clustered, and ranked markers; attempted LLM annotation with fallback heuristic; resulting labels are biologically sensible but lacked explicit validation metrics beyond marker presence.
Custom LR interaction table with permutation tests, no biological interpretation, no explicit normalization or ligand-receptor database citation.
Used existing predicted_celltype and marker-based approach; agreement 92%, but lacked thorough method justification and only minimal statistical checks.
Used cell-type-stratified latent-order mean aggregation, achieving high compression and perfect purity; no parameter exploration but validated metrics.

Agent discovered appropriate spatial clustering APIs but only two truncated turns are visible; final checks passed, indicating competent execution, though detailed stats and interpretation were not shown in the trajectory.

Loaded Visium correctly, used truth labels for domains, and built spatial neighbor transition matrix manually; missed using a dedicated spatial trajectory method (e.g., STT) as expected, causing stt_real_call fail.
Fell back to correlation-based GRN after SCENIC pipeline failed; missing motif enrichment and statistical validation, but final outputs passed all existence and dimension checks.

Agent loaded both references, inspected labels, chose a marker-based NNLS approach, validated fraction sums, and saved data correctly; no biological interpretation or in-depth statistical validation was performed.

Agent properly inspected AnnData, handled missing cell_type by deriving spatial clusters, and stored a directional CCC table with proximity weights and empirical p-values; however, LR pairs did not pass the reference LR check, and biological interpretation was absent.

Solid loading/QC/coordinate merge; used Moran's I for spatial autocorrelation but selected top-1000 genes without p-values or FDR, weakening statistical rigor; brief biological interpretation of top markers.
Synthetic composition dominated by rare subtypes, failing correlation threshold; low deconvolution correlation ignored.
Adequate deconvolution with good data handling and final agreement, but limited method diversity and minimal biological interpretation.
Appropriate data inspection and test selection for log-scale bulk data; missing biological interpretation of DE results.

Data loading and inspection thorough; correctly derived groups from sample prefixes; used omicverse DE and string_interaction; network had 6 edges, meeting requirements; hub summary included degree and weighted degree; biological interpretation brief but plausible (synaptic/GABAergic nodes).

Loaded data carefully avoiding wide-file dump, but no normalization or missing-value checks. Used MAD-based gene selection and clustering that produced modules but likely not a full weighted-gene-correlation-network (soft-threshold, TOM) approach, and provided only correlations without p-values or validation. Provided limited biological interpretation beyond tissue association.
Agent inspected data, ran DE and two-database enrichment, refined with directional analysis to meet FDR threshold; biological interpretation completely absent.
Inspected AnnData, ran DPT and Palantir with proper anchoring, computed Spearman correlation; Slingshot attempt failed but was recognized.
Agent correctly converted CSV, applied PQN/log/scaling, ran PCA/PLS/OPLS; PLS-DA silhouette passed. No biological interpretation or discussion of limitations.

Agent correctly loaded, inspected, and preprocessed the data, reused existing clusters, applied standard PAGA+DPT, and verified pseudotime medians with a brief biological interpretation; statistical verification is basic but meets the task.
Adequate trajectory inference using DPT and PAGA; validated root anchoring and terminal endocrine states with quantitative checks.
Competent preprocessing and dual-mode velocity, but missing required uns['velocity_modes'] and no biological interpretation or comparison of modes.
Agent correctly handled data, computed required metrics and tests, but provided no biological interpretation of the diversity results.
Data handling and method selection were strong, statistical rigor adequate with p-values and FDR, but biological interpretation was minimal; agent acknowledged limitations partially.
Strong technical execution with appropriate normalization and tests; no biological commentary or interpretation beyond the required outputs.
All required metrics and keys correctly produced; biological narrative minimal beyond noting group separation strength.
ScGPT fine-tune run with proper preprocessing, full coverage, and plausible PBMC labels; high training-set accuracy but no independent hold-out evaluation.
Agent debugged pyarrow and used ov.fm.run correctly, but augmented scGPT embedding with marker-gene features to inflate silhouette, undermining both scientific reasoning and statistical rigour.

Agent correctly loaded raw PBMC counts, chose scGPT zero-shot integrate from local checkpoints, handled a pyarrow import error, and saved required obsm and uns entries; limited data validation and no biological interpretation beyond a batch-size acknowledgment.
Standard preprocessing executed correctly, but no biological interpretation was provided (task didn't require it).

Agent executed the required aggregation and diversity computations correctly but did not demonstrate explicit data validation, provide biological context, or discuss choices/limitations in its reasoning.

All steps correctly executed using real scanpy/omicverse APIs. Minimal narrative but appropriate doublet methods and QC logic.

Agent successfully performed HVG selection using seurat_v3 on counts layer; inspected data beforehand. No explicit biological interpretation or reasoning narrative shown, but results are correct and all checks passed.
Data loaded and validated, correct methods applied, results verified; no biological interpretation attempted as task was purely pipeline-oriented.
Correctly performed all QC steps and produced valid outputs, but doublet calling thresholds were applied without justification and no biological context was discussed.

Minimal but correct execution; no validation metrics or biological interpretation beyond cell-type counts.

Thorough data inspection and normalization, appropriate AUCell-like scoring, clear specificity checks, but no formal significance tests.

Accurate label transfer, but minimal statistical validation and no biological interpretation.

Loaded and inspected data well, but used pre-existing predicted_celltype as second method instead of running an independent external reference mapper; final annotation columns appear identical, undermining statistical independence.

Successfully completed deconvolution via NNLS after Tangram failed, with proper data loading and validation, but lacked method justification, biological interpretation of spatial patterns, and statistical assessment of result quality.
Good data inspection and method choice, but minimal biological interpretation and no handling of NaN correlation.

Agent correctly loaded and grouped data, ran three distinct DE methods with proper output storage; biological interpretation was entirely absent, and DESeq2 required a potentially lossy integer conversion.
Agent used DPT on spatial coordinates to compute pseudotime and derived domain transition matrix; handles data loading and truth mapping well, but lacks expression-based trajectory.

Agent correctly identified the missing cell_type column, ran Leiden clustering, and attempted spatial communication with COMMOT, but no results were produced due to timeout and an attribute error; species mismatch was not addressed.
Correctly handled CSV misnamed as .h5ad, proper preprocessing, multi-method comparison, but lacked biological interpretation of metabolite results.
Agent used log-normalized data for BayesPrism deconvolution without transformation, leading to poor proportion estimates and failure to match reference composition.
Ensemble replicates were identical, indicating no real ensembling; adata checks passed but methodology was deeply flawed.

Data loaded correctly but not log-transformed for WGCNA; omicverse WGCNA wrapper failed, so agent used correlation-based k-means clustering without TOM; no biological interpretation of modules or trait associations.

Raw counts used without log-normalization; p-values suspiciously identical (0.004975) due to flawed permutation test; no multiple-testing correction; no biological interpretation beyond storing table; overall approach too simplistic for a hard task.
Used cell-type-aware metacell aggregation via PCA+k-means; purity guaranteed; no alternative methods explored.

Data handling and API use were robust; enrichment tables stored meet specs. However, no biological interpretation, minimal reasoning about method choices, and DE method (t-test on log-normalised counts) is simplistic for bulk RNA-seq.

Solid execution of Wilcoxon and DESeq2 with careful debugging; missing biological interpretation of specific taxa despite having taxonomy annotations.
Successfully computed alpha/beta diversity and statistical tests, but provided no biological interpretation and did not mention the single Mock sample limitation in reasoning.

Successfully collapsed and computed diversities; initial sparse-indexing missteps but recovered; biological context not discussed but not required; final uns storage as dict rather than DataFrame is acceptable.
Tree built but mapping error caused zero Faith PD; UniFrac/PERMANOVA not attempted; no biological interpretation.
Workflow correctly implemented but no biological interpretation was offered.
Agent performed basic data inspection but failed to apply any foundation model, producing none of the required outputs.
Agent inspected the data and explored geneformer tokenizer but failed to produce any annotation or embedding; task uncompleted.
Incomplete trajectory; no perturbation prediction or output saving performed.
Agent explored model checkpoints and source code but never performed actual zero-shot inference; no required output keys saved in the AnnData.
Solid data handling and correct doublet-detection APIs after troubleshooting; minimal biological interpretation and ad-hoc threshold choices reduce rigor.
Harness reports counts_int=FAIL despite agent correctly saving int32 layer; all other handling sound.
Correctly applied seurat_v3 HVG, inspected data, handled errors, and saved expected output; all grader checks passed.
Agent correctly executed PCA, neighbors, UMAP; no biological interpretation or statistical validation required, but no discussion of parameter choices or deprecated warning.

Loaded and validated data; minor persistence error. Explored many resolutions but final script used only three and chose 0.4 despite higher silhouette at 0.25 from earlier scans, with no justification. No biological interpretation.
Pipeline executed cleanly with thorough parameter checks and multi-resolution Leiden; lacked biological interpretation but not explicitly required.
Agent successfully ran three DE methods, stored results properly, and confirmed canonical PBMC markers, with minor debugging struggles but final output meets all checks.
Agent correctly subsetted and reclustered but showed no quantitative validation, marker-gene analysis, or biological interpretation.

Agent inspected data but used naive methods (linear regression, z-score norm) that barely qualify; naming inconsistency between obsm keys and method names; silhouette metrics were computed but no LISI; biological interpretation absent.

Agent used scanpy.tl.ingest successfully after iterative troubleshooting; computed overall accuracy but no per-type metrics or biological interpretation beyond listing predicted cell types. Data handling was solid, though query cell_type was set to 'unknown' rather than NaN.
CellTypist and marker scoring used correctly; RF trained on existing cell_type is not a truly independent annotation but overall approach meets the required agreement thresholds.
Used sklearn NMF with custom consensus; iterative but unstable, final result had one unused program; reasonable gene loadings but no explicit biological interpretation or statistical validation.
Agent attempted pySCENIC but failed due to environment/dask issues; switched to simple correlation without leveraging motif databases; no required outputs saved to AnnData.
Agent attempted CellPhoneDB but got stuck in mapping database IDs, never produced required ccc table; no output saved.
Agent repeatedly used ground truth ARI for hyperparameter tuning and final model selection, violating the explicit no-leakage constraint; no biological interpretation of spatial domains was provided.
Loading adapted well to Visium HD format; Moran's I method appropriate but lack of significance testing and arbitrary top-100 cutoff weakens statistical rigor.
Manually implemented spatial pseudotime and transition matrix using truth labels; not a proper STT method, low statistical validation, but data handling and final storage structure correct.

Used fallback linear regression methods when deconv packages were unavailable; correlations were high for few non-zero cell types; many cell types had zero variance leading to low diversity; no biological interpretation.
Basic data loading and inspection but naive pseudoinverse deconvolution without proper spatial tools; no statistical validation or biological insights.

Adequate data loading and grouping; strong multi-method approach, but the negative binomial and permutation implementations produced extreme/unrealistic padj values and the agent did not diagnose these issues; no biological interpretation provided.
Strong preprocessing and multivariate embeddings with silhouette validation, but no biological interpretation or narrative.
Agent built a custom WGCNA-like pipeline after failing to load R WGCNA, resulting in unbalanced modules and no biological interpretation; data handling lacked normalization.
Correct filtering and DE; custom GSEA after API issues; zero p-values suggest permutation min not handled; limited biological commentary.
Correctly loaded data, chose appropriate gene sets, fixed API call; missing normalization step and deeper statistical validation, but overall competent.
Agent performed basic data inspection, ran DPT and velocity pseudotime correctly, verified anchoring and distinctness, but lacked deeper narrative and formal statistical testing.
Agent successfully computed two velocity modes with scvelo, handled errors, but lacked biological interpretation.
DE analysis done, but all top p-values identical; PPI via STRING API but no biological interpretation or discussion of limitations.
Handled HVG error by preprocessing log first, corrected DPT iroot to root, and ensured Ductal lowest pseudotime by using central cell.
All required outputs generated correctly, but no biological interpretation was attempted and reasoning about statistical choices (e.g., Kruskal-Wallis with n=1 Mock group) was limited.
Two distinct DA methods (Wilcoxon, DESeq2) were applied correctly; top taxa overlap met threshold; biological interpretation of taxa not explored.
DPT and scvelo velocity pseudotime implemented correctly; scvelo version adaptation done; biological interpretation limited but trajectory order matches expected development.
Workflow correctly implemented with rarefied Bray-Curtis, PCoA, and PERMANOVA; no biological interpretation provided, and rarefaction randomness not addressed.
Competent assembly of phylogenetic tree and diversity metrics; minor gaps in explicit data validation, but all required outputs correctly generated and stored.
The agent correctly aggregated and computed diversity, but lacked biological interpretation and did not explore the mismatch in ASV Shannon indices.

Geneformer embeddings stored correctly; tokenization handled mapping; metrics included silhouette but biological interpretation was superficial and positive claims contradicted negative cell-type silhouette.

Geneformer embeddings gave negative silhouette; agent tried alternative pooling/layers but did not resolve; other foundation models were not successfully used, and no biological interpretation was provided.

Geneformer fine-tuning completed with explicit training metrics; data handling was careful despite manual tokenization; statistical rigor is moderate (only accuracy reported, no per-class metrics or confounding explanation for generalization gap); biological interpretation is minimal; reasoning is thorough with sanity checks on model outputs.

Custom perturbation pipeline yielded nearly constant per-cell response magnitude, indicating likely methodological flaw; data loading and API usage were generally correct but the predicted expression matrix and effect sizes lack biological realism.
